name: botomapa
description: Multi-country political data visualisation — client + thin static-JSON server.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.geo:uk: mapshaper server/data/raw/geojson/PCON_JUL_2024_BGC.geojson -simplify 8% keep-shapes -clean -filter-fields PCON24CD,PCON24NM -rename-layers uk2024 -o format=topojson quantization=1e5 client/public/geometry/uk-2024.topojson && cp server/data/raw/topojson/uk.json client/public/geometry/uk-2017.topojson && cp server/data/raw/hexjson/uk-constituencies-2024.hexjson client/public/geometry/uk-2024.hexjson
